description: Style Note baggit was founded in 1990 and since then has created a name in the market for fighting against cruelty to animals. A practical and stylish choice of clutch in silver with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this fabric clutch will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit. Product Details Silver clutch with one main zipped compartment that has an inner zipped pocket and two insert pockets A bow and graphic glossy look all over the clutch Material and Care Blended fabric Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight Size Height: 11 cm Width: 22 cm
